name: Url.Interpolate

aliases.name: Context
aliases.comment: the Context for a template interpolation

values.name: addAssoc
values.comment: add an associated list (in other words a map) to a context
values.type: Url.Interpolate.Context -> String.String -> Dict.Dict String.String String.String -> Url.Interpolate.Context

values.name: addList
values.comment: add a list of strings to the context

values.name: addScalar
values.comment: add a scalar (in other words a simple string) value to the context

values.name: interpolate
values.comment:
Example URI template interpolation:

    interpolate "<http://example.com/{path}{?x,y,empty}"> <|
      simpleContext [("path", "hello"), ("x", "1024"), ("y", "768")]

    -- "<http://example.com/hello?x=1024&y=768&empty=">

values.name: simpleContext
